query: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS media_assets (id int AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY, user_id int NOT NULL, workspace_id int, file_name varchar(256) NOT NULL, file_key text NOT NULL, url text NOT NULL, mime_type varchar(128) NOT NULL, size bigint NOT NULL, width int, height int, tags json DEFAULT NULL, folder varchar(128) DEFAULT 'Uncategorized', created_at timestamp DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL, updated_at timestamp DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL);
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2qNhRDYaxzneXfG.9d70d45e7b6d --database KXbJ95iGQTQDrViqhuR8ny --execute CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS media_assets (id int AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY, user_id int NOT NULL, workspace_id int, file_name varchar(256) NOT NULL, file_key text NOT NULL, url text NOT NULL, mime_type varchar(128) NOT NULL, size bigint NOT NULL, width int, height int, tags json DEFAULT NULL, folder varchar(128) DEFAULT 'Uncategorized', created_at timestamp DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL, updated_at timestamp DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL);
